must: Focus states must be clearly visible (focus-visible ring).
Interactive targets should be at least 40px tall or have equivalent hit area padding.
Text contrast should target WCAG AA for normal text where feasible in prototypes.
Respect user preferences: if prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, reduce or disable non-essential motion.
should: Prefer semantic tokens over primitive tokens in app code.
Use spacing tokens for layout/padding/margins instead of arbitrary pixel values.
must_not: Do not remove focus outlines without providing an accessible alternative.
Do not communicate state only via color (add text/icon/aria where relevant).

motion.reduced_motion: If prefers-reduced-motion is set, use minimal transitions (or none) for hover/enter/exit.
